description: Cluster-wide CPU CFS throttling ratios and throttled time via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Single static instance. Filters container!='' to exclude pod-level pause container aggregates. Throttle ratio calculated as (throttled_periods / total_periods) * 100. Namespace hot spot count uses 25% threshold per community convention.
name: OCP_CPU_Throttling
